name: wonder-together-skill
description: Create Wonder Together compact parent-led visual explainers and gentle scripts from children's questions.

interface.shortDescription: Create compact visual explainers from children's questions.
interface.longDescription: Wonder Together packages a creator-facing skill for turning a child's question into a warm parent-mediated visual explainer with one image, what to notice, a tiny try-it idea, and a parent note. Fuller stories, games, or packets stay optional follow-ups.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $wonder-together to turn a child's question into a compact parent-led visual explainer.
